proof_boundary: This kit makes the five-niche pilot measurable for owner review. It is not buyer validation, willingness-to-pay proof, hosted proof, enterprise readiness, prediction accuracy proof, or commercial-ready proof.

current_source_alignment.implication: Pilot claims should be tied to measured and governed risk-management evidence before any broader AI trust claim is upgraded.

current_source_alignment.source: NIST Secure Software Development Framework SP 800-218
current_source_alignment.implication: Launch evidence should separate planned controls, implemented controls, and verified outcomes.
Forecasting claims need dynamic, resolved-outcome evaluation with comparable baselines rather than fixture-only demonstrations.
Foresight value should be measured as better structured exploration and decision preparation, not as single-future prediction.

current_source_alignment.source: OWASP Top 10 for Large Language Model Applications
current_source_alignment.implication: LLM-enabled pilot evidence should preserve human review, provenance, prompt/input boundaries, and no-autonomous-action guardrails.

outcome_rows.buyer_job: Turn ambiguous geopolitical, policy, supplier, or operational risk questions into evidence-backed briefs, countermove maps, review states, and scoreable forecast drafts.
outcome_rows.pilot_case_unit: one high-stakes strategy, policy, geopolitical, supplier, or operational-risk question
outcome_rows.baseline_measure: current hours from source pack or analyst intake to buyer-reviewed decision brief
outcome_rows.target_outcome_measure: pilot hours from source pack to evidence-linked brief with actor reasoning, countermoves, review state, and forecast-draft handoff
outcome_rows.quality_measure: buyer reviewer rates evidence coverage, assumption clarity, option clarity, and next-action usefulness against the current workflow
outcome_rows.buyer_decision_event: internal follow-up, paid pilot discussion, LOI/procurement path, or no-fit decision
minimum_valid_pilot_evidence: 3 to 5 representative cases from one buyer team
before and after time-to-reviewed-brief records
one named reviewer note per case
proof shown and objection captured for each case
outcome_rows.success_threshold_for_owner_review: At least 3 cases completed with a credible time or clarity improvement signal and no unsupported prediction claim.
outcome_rows.sale_boundary: guided pilot only; no commercial-ready or prediction-superiority claim
proof_assets: Strategist/enterprise workflow route and function evidence
owner_input_needed: owner-approved pilot case or cohort
baseline capture before demo or pilot
buyer reviewer note after pilot run
decision event and next action

outcome_rows.buyer_job: Link research evidence, human review, forecast governance, Brier scoring, and resolved-outcome learning.
outcome_rows.pilot_case_unit: one scoreable forecast question or research question that can become a forecast
outcome_rows.baseline_measure: current forecast or decision-confidence baseline with source, timestamp, probability method, and resolution criteria
outcome_rows.target_outcome_measure: complete pre-resolution forecast packet with evidence cutoff, human review, comparable baseline, and planned Brier/log scoring
outcome_rows.quality_measure: forecastability, leakage risk, baseline comparability, and reviewer approval status
outcome_rows.buyer_decision_event: buyer accepts the scoring protocol, supplies baseline rows, requests paid scoring pilot, or rejects the protocol
minimum_valid_pilot_evidence: 3 to 5 pre-resolution candidate questions for workflow review
25 or more owner-approved resolved rows before accuracy claims
comparable baseline source and timestamp for every scored row
leakage and ambiguity review before scoring
outcome_rows.success_threshold_for_owner_review: Protocol is accepted by the buyer and at least one real baseline source is available; accuracy claims remain blocked until resolved rows score.
outcome_rows.sale_boundary: do not sell accuracy until owner-approved resolved outcomes and real baselines are scored
owner_input_needed: owner-approved pilot case or cohort
baseline capture before demo or pilot
buyer reviewer note after pilot run
decision event and next action

outcome_rows.niche: Geopolitical risk radar and scenario monitor
outcome_rows.buyer_job: Monitor external risk signals and convert them into actor-aware strategic prompts and scenarios.
outcome_rows.pilot_case_unit: one live or buyer-approved geopolitical risk signal converted into scenario and decision prompts
outcome_rows.baseline_measure: current time from external signal detection to scenario brief and stakeholder action recommendation
outcome_rows.target_outcome_measure: pilot time from source signal to actor-aware scenario, countermeasure prompt, provenance label, and review decision
outcome_rows.quality_measure: source freshness, provenance completeness, actionability, and false-positive/escalation review
outcome_rows.buyer_decision_event: buyer asks for monitoring follow-up, rejects freshness/provenance, or requests hosted proof before continuing
minimum_valid_pilot_evidence: non-simulated source or buyer-approved scenario input
freshness timestamp and source provenance
reviewer escalation or no-action decision
hosted smoke evidence before production-live claims
outcome_rows.success_threshold_for_owner_review: Buyer confirms the radar-to-scenario workflow is useful for triage; hosted-live and feed SLA claims remain blocked.
outcome_rows.sale_boundary: requires hosted non-simulated feed proof and freshness/SLA labels before production claims
owner_input_needed: owner-approved pilot case or cohort
baseline capture before demo or pilot
buyer reviewer note after pilot run
decision event and next action

outcome_rows.buyer_job: Package the same evidence/review/forecast workflow for executives, analysts, and governance reviewers.
outcome_rows.pilot_case_unit: one executive or analyst decision brief generated from the same reviewed evidence bundle
outcome_rows.baseline_measure: current number of review cycles or hours from analyst draft to executive-ready brief
outcome_rows.target_outcome_measure: pilot review cycles or hours from evidence bundle to executive-ready brief with assumptions, options, and decision asks preserved
outcome_rows.quality_measure: executive clarity rating, analyst correction count, and governance reviewer signoff status
outcome_rows.buyer_decision_event: buyer approves internal follow-up, asks for governance changes, or rejects the briefing format
minimum_valid_pilot_evidence: 3 buyer-reviewable briefing cases
before and after draft cycle count or preparation time
analyst correction notes
reviewer signoff or blocker notes
outcome_rows.success_threshold_for_owner_review: At least one buyer reviewer says the briefing format improves review speed or decision clarity without losing caveats.
outcome_rows.sale_boundary: use as demo narrative, not standalone enterprise platform claim
owner_input_needed: owner-approved pilot case or cohort
baseline capture before demo or pilot
buyer reviewer note after pilot run
decision event and next action

outcome_rows.buyer_job: Train managers, students, and analysts on negotiation, game trees, and forecasting discipline with structured debriefs.
outcome_rows.pilot_case_unit: one cohort exercise using negotiation, game tree, or forecasting discipline on an applied organizational case
outcome_rows.baseline_measure: pre-exercise rubric score for structured reasoning, assumption testing, and decision communication
outcome_rows.target_outcome_measure: post-exercise rubric score plus debrief quality and transfer-to-work signal
outcome_rows.quality_measure: rubric delta, facilitator notes, learner self-assessment, and buyer manager relevance rating
outcome_rows.buyer_decision_event: cohort follow-up, paid training pilot discussion, curriculum revision request, or no fit
minimum_valid_pilot_evidence: one owner-approved cohort and rubric
pre and post rubric results
facilitator debrief notes
buyer manager relevance rating
outcome_rows.success_threshold_for_owner_review: Cohort shows a measurable rubric delta or manager-approved relevance signal; training remains an adjacent lane until buyer proof exists.
outcome_rows.sale_boundary: requires classroom hosted smoke and buyer-specific curriculum proof before packaging as training product
owner_input_needed: owner-approved pilot case or cohort
baseline capture before demo or pilot
buyer reviewer note after pilot run
decision event and next action

acceptance_gates.evidence: 5/5 top-five niches have outcome rows; selected_target_coverage=5/5.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Keep this measurement contract attached to the five-niche pilot package until buyer evidence changes the ranking.
Capture baseline before any buyer pilot run so value can be measured instead of inferred.
Record no-fit, follow-up, paid-pilot, LOI, and procurement-path outcomes exactly after owner-approved calls.

acceptance_gates.evidence: 5 current source anchors map the kit to AI risk management, software security, forecast evaluation, foresight, and LLM risk boundaries.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Refresh source anchors when AI evaluation, forecasting, or public-sector foresight standards change.

acceptance_gates.evidence: 0 forbidden claim mentions in measurement rows and proof boundary.
acceptance_gates.next_action: Keep outcome-measurement language separate from buyer-validation, hosted-live, enterprise-ready, and prediction-accuracy claims.
Owner approves pilot case collection, then records real before/after and buyer decision events.

release_holds.evidence_needed: Owner-approved real pilot rows with baseline values, pilot outcome values, reviewer notes, and buyer decision events.
At least three qualified follow-ups and one paid-pilot, LOI, or procurement-path signal from real calls.
Owner-approved resolved forecast rows, comparable baselines, leakage review, and scoring evidence.

next_actions: Attach this kit to the owner review packet before buyer calls so each pilot has a baseline and target outcome.
Do not run buyer calls without baseline capture fields; otherwise sellability cannot be measured after the call.
After owner-approved pilot rows exist, rerun buyer input validation, substitution evidence validation, buyer proof gate, and commercial confidence gate.
Keep launch decision at pilot-only until owner, buyer, hosted, enterprise, and prediction evidence gates pass.
